description: Red Lion Crimson 3.0 is open. A marine engineering firm is retrofitting the SCADA monitoring system for a commercial tugboat's main propulsion engines. As the marine automation engineer responsible for compliance with ABS (American Bureau of Shipping) standards, configure the 5 active Port engine tags in the Data Tags section according to the tag register and ABS standards found in the CrimsonTasks folder on the Desktop. Do not configure any Starboard (ST_*) tags. Create a continuous Data Logger named 'PortEngineLog' with a 1-second update rate containing all 5 Port engine tags. Save the project as 'marine_engine.c3' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\. Login credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!
